metadata.title: Scroll to Top
metadata.description: This is a plugin for Obsidian that adds a button to scroll to the top of the current note.

regex.source: .setName("Change icon of scroll to top button")
regex.target: .setName("更改滚动到顶部按钮的图标")

regex.source: .setName("Change icon of scroll to bottom button")
regex.target: .setName(" 更改滚动到底部按钮的图标")

regex.source: .setName("Change icon of scroll to cursor button")
regex.target: .setName("将滚动图标更改为光标按钮")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show scroll to top button in the right bottom corner.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在右下角显示滚动到顶部按钮.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show scroll to bottom button in the right bottom corner.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在右下角显示滚动到底部按钮.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show scroll to cursor button in the right bottom corner.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在右下角显示滚动到光标按钮.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show tooltip when hover on the button.")
regex.target: .setDesc("悬停在按钮上时显示工具提示.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Scroll on WebView (Should work with Surfing Plugin).")
regex.target: .setDesc(" 在 WebView 上滚动（应与冲浪插件配合使用）.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Change tooltip text of scroll to top button.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改滚动到顶部按钮的工具提示文本.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Change tooltip text of scroll to bottom button.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改滚动到底部按钮的工具提示文本.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Change tooltip text of scroll to cursor button.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改滚动到光标按钮的工具提示文本.")
